title: Mulavana Mahadevar Temple
tagline: Mulavana Mahadevar Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Mulavana Mahadevar Temple or Sree Mahadevar Temple is a temple in the village of Mulavana, Kerala in southern India, managed by the Mulavana Mahadevar Devaswom.
overview.description: Mulavana Mahadevar Temple or Sree Mahadevar Temple is a temple in the village of Mulavana, Kerala in southern India, managed by the Mulavana Mahadevar Devaswom. The temple is the principal place of worship for Mulavana and neighboring areas; it is open to the public, and people are free to enter and worship. The Kadalayi Mana had hereditary rights for managing the affairs of the temple and its property. The temple hosts a festival for Maha Shivaratri in the month of Kumbham (February/March).

topPlaces.name: Mulavana
topPlaces.description: Mulavana is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. The place is filled with almost all types of shops, which includes stationary, fancy, textile etc.

topPlaces.name: Kanjiracodu
topPlaces.description: Kanjiracode in Kundara lies on the banks of the Kanjiracodu Kayal of Kollam district in Kerala, India. The area postal pin code is 629155.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Cathedral, Kundara
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral in a Kollam District, Kerala, India is a Jacobite Syrian Christian Church under Syriac Orthodox Church of Antioch, is a Pakalomattam Parish Church migrated from Kuravilangad.

topPlaces.name: St Antony's Church, Kanjiracode

topPlaces.name: Perayam, Kollam
topPlaces.description: Perayam is a panchayat in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. The nearest town is Kundara, a major industry hub of Kollam district.

topPlaces.name: Onambalam
topPlaces.description: Onambalam is a small inland fishing and trading harbour in Kumbalam, Kollam, India on the shore of Ashtamudi lake. With improvements in road transport its prominence has reduced after 1980s and now it is used as a fish market and a harbour for small inland fishing vessels.

topPlaces.name: Kottappuram, Kollam
topPlaces.description: Kottappuram is a part of the village Perayam in the Kollam District, situated in Indian State of Kerala. It has a population of nearly 3000.

topPlaces.name: Karikuzhi
topPlaces.description: Karikuzhi is a place in Kollam district of Kerala, India. Nearby places are Perayam, Kumbalam, Padappakkara and Kanjiracodu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mulavana Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mulavana Mahadevar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mulavana Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mulavana Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mulavana Mahadevar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mulavana Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mulavana Mahadevar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mulavana Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mulavana, Kanjiracodu, St. Mary's Cathedral, Kundara, St Antony's Church, Kanjiracode, Perayam, Kollam.
